englishDefinitions: The willingness to accept an imaginary or unrealistic story as believable while reading, watching, or listening to it.
persianTranslation: پذیرش موقتِ امر غیرواقعی برای لذت بردن از داستان
examples: A good fantasy film requires suspension of disbelief.
The audience's suspension of disbelief made the story more powerful.
Some impossible details can still work if viewers practice suspension of disbelief.
